introSection: Rocky was a steel roller coaster located at Kintetsu Ayameike in Nara, Nara, Japan. By the time this coaster closed in 2004, it was one of the oldest roller coasters in Japan.
fullText: Rocky was a steel roller coaster located at Kintetsu Ayameike in Nara, Nara, Japan. By the time this coaster closed in 2004, it was one of the oldest roller coasters in Japan.
